html:
$DHB is the native utility currency of the DeHub network. It is the single unit of account across every d'app — the thing you tip with, unlock content with, earn for watching and creating, and spend on AI generation. Because it lives on-chain, every movement of value in the ecosystem is publicly verifiable rather than sitting in a private ledger you have to take our word for.

How the currency works in-app: Every DeHub account has a wallet built in. You can fund it with a card through our Stripe gateway, receive it from another user, earn it from the platform, or deposit it from any self-custodial wallet — there is no separate app, extension or seed phrase required to start. Balances, tips, unlocks and rewards all settle in $DHB, so value moves between users directly instead of being routed through a payment processor that takes a cut and can freeze an account.

Holding and staking also change how the app behaves for you. The more $DHB you hold, the lower your platform fees and the more capability you unlock — badges, verification, trend boosts, club tiers and enhanced rights across the network.

What it is used for:

  • Tipping creators: Send value straight to a creator on a post, short, stream or stage — instantly, globally and without a middleman skimming the transfer.
  • Purchasing content: Unlock pay-per-view uploads, token-locked posts, premium messages and creator subscriptions. The creator is paid on unlock, not 30 days later.
  • Rewards currency: x-2-earn payouts, watch rewards, bounties on published content, raffles, games and community campaigns are all denominated and paid in $DHB.
  • AI generation credits: Spend $DHB as credits across the AI Toolkits — image, video, audio and agent generation — instead of holding a separate subscription per tool.
  • Stores & marketplace: Buy products, digital collectables, services and Phygital NFTs from creator stores and the marketplace using one balance.
  • Fees, staking & governance: Pay network fees, stake into club tiers for protocol revenue share, and burn $DHB to cast governance votes on protocol decisions.

Profit share: DeHub is designed so that the people using the network own it. Protocol revenue — platform fees, store and marketplace fees, advertising, AI usage and game revenue — flows back to holders who stake, in the form of real-yield distributions and buy-backs rather than freshly minted supply. Owning $DHB is therefore ownership of a share of the DeHub network itself, not just a spending balance.

Distributions are funded from what the protocol actually earns, at variable intervals, and are split across staking tiers by both amount and duration staked. Longer commitment earns a larger share of each distribution.

Pegged price and DEX listing: $DHB is a utility token. For in-app purposes it is currently pegged at $0.001 per token, which is the rate you see when buying through the fiat gateway and the rate used for in-app pricing. That peg exists to keep the in-app economy stable and predictable while the network is being scaled — it is an internal accounting rate, not a floor, guarantee or promise of future value.

The token is due to be deployed to decentralised exchanges shortly, with the initial liquidity pool opening at that same 0.001 base price and multi-chain pools seeded alongside it. Once live, $DHB becomes freely tradable and the market — not DeHub — sets the price, which means it can trade above or below the in-app peg at any time. $DHB will only ever be officially listed on DEXs so that every transaction stays publicly verifiable on-chain.

Disclaimer: While holding $DHB grants ownership in the DeHub network and entitles stakers to a share of protocol profits, there is no set APY, no guaranteed rate of return and no expectation of profit of any kind. All distributions are entirely dependent on network performance and the revenue the protocol actually generates in a given period. Rewards may be lower than any previous period, and may be zero. Nothing on this page is a promise, projection or offer of a return, and nothing here is financial advice.

DeHub tokens are strictly for utility purposes in the same way that any in-game or in-app digital tokens or currencies and strictly not an investment. The above data is solely compiled for transparency, educational and informative purposes only. DeHub and all affiliates hold no liability for financial losses incurred from purchasing any tokens or NFTs we release. Markets are highly volatile. Therefore, you should only ever spend what you can afford to lose.
